message:
fix(runtime): add region close notification so scope awaits child completion

The scope was returning from child region teardown before the region had
actually transitioned to Closed state, allowing parent tasks to observe
stale intermediate state from child regions that were still draining.

Region close notification (src/record/region.rs):
- Add RegionCloseState struct with closed flag and optional Waker
- Add close_notify field (Arc<Mutex<RegionCloseState>>) to RegionRecord
- Fire waker when region transitions to Closed in try_close() and
  restore_snapshot(), ensuring both normal shutdown and snapshot-forced
  closure paths notify waiters

Scope await (src/cx/scope.rs):
- After advance_region_state(), clone close_notify handle and await
  RegionCloseFuture that polls the closed flag
- RegionCloseFuture registers waker on Pending, returns Ready when
  closed is true
- Uses will_wake() check to avoid unnecessary waker cloning

This ensures the scope only returns after the child region is fully
closed and its heap is reclaimed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
